CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-18-2014 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Westley, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-362-2817), for Ivan Hernandez & Manuel Valdes, Plaintiffs/Cross-Defendants and moving parties.
Juliana Pisani, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-296-0900), for Miriam Nunez, Cross-Complainant and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments, modifies and adopted the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANTS IVAN HERNANDEZ and MANUEL VALDES' Demurrer to Cross Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND within 30 days. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
